'''Arly Bron''' was a stocky, aging [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] with a genial air and sharp tongue who frequented the [[Corellian Sector (Nar Shaddaa)/Legends|Corellian Sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], Arly Bron was one of the captains who helped the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] where he piloted the ''[[Double Echo]]'' and served as one of the atmosphere guides during the [[Battle of Ylesia]].

==Behind the scenes==
He was named after writer R. Lee Brown, founder and original editor of ''Echo Station'', the original ''Star Wars'' online e-mag (itself the source of Bron's ship the ''[[Double Echo]]'').
